description_long: This is an elegant, vintage-style chaise with a high, ornately carved wooden frame finished in a light, natural wood tone. The backrest and seat are upholstered in a solid blue fabric, providing a soft and inviting appearance. Two matching blue square cushions are placed at either end, enhancing comfort and symmetry. The armrests are also framed in carved wood, with gentle curves and decorative motifs that match the backrest. The legs are slender, turned, and feature carved detailing, contributing to the overall classical aesthetic. The rear of the chaise is fully upholstered in blue fabric, bordered by the same carved wood frame.
description: A vintage-style chaise with ornate light wood framing, blue upholstery, and two matching cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full carved wooden frame, blue upholstered seat and backrest, and two blue cushions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the profile of the armrest, and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous blue upholstery bordered by the carved wooden frame, with no cushions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest profile and the arrangement of the cushions.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and rectangular with a gently undulating top edge, featuring intricate carved floral and scroll motifs along the upper wooden frame. It is fully upholstered in blue fabric with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, constructed from carved wood with gentle curves and decorative detailing.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slender, turned, and feature carved decorative elements, matching the ornate style of the frame and finished in a light wood tone.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose, square blue cushions placed at either end of the seat, complementing the fixed upholstered seat and backrest.
